scripts.typecheck: tsc --build integration/tsconfig.json && tsc --project bench/tsconfig.json && tsc --project e2e/tsconfig.json
scripts.test: pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:integration
scripts.e2eg: node ../../scripts/e2e/ensure-e2e-build.mjs @universe-editor/editor && cross-env UNIVERSE_E2E_NO_TAG_FILTER=1 playwright test -c e2e/playwright.config.ts --grep
scripts.e2e: node ../../scripts/e2e/ensure-e2e-build.mjs @universe-editor/editor && playwright test -c e2e/playwright.config.ts && cross-env UNIVERSE_E2E_ONLY_TAG=@serial playwright test -c e2e/playwright.config.ts --workers=1
scripts.e2ea: node ../../scripts/e2e/ensure-e2e-build.mjs @universe-editor/editor && cross-env UNIVERSE_E2E_INCLUDE_REGRESSION=1 playwright test -c e2e/playwright.config.ts && cross-env UNIVERSE_E2E_ONLY_TAG=@serial playwright test -c e2e/playwright.config.ts --workers=1
scripts.e2e:regression: node ../../scripts/e2e/ensure-e2e-build.mjs @universe-editor/editor && cross-env UNIVERSE_E2E_ONLY_TAG=@regression playwright test -c e2e/playwright.config.ts
scripts.package:win: pnpm -w run runtime:stage && pnpm --filter "@universe-editor/editor..." build && electron-builder --win nsis dir && pnpm -w run runtime:verify:packaged
scripts.package:win:dir: pnpm -w run runtime:stage && pnpm --filter "@universe-editor/editor..." build && electron-builder --win dir && pnpm -w run runtime:verify:packaged
scripts.package:win:installer: pnpm -w run runtime:stage && pnpm --filter "@universe-editor/editor..." build && electron-builder --win nsis && pnpm -w run runtime:verify:packaged
